title: linum altaicum subsp. altaicum
intro: Linum altaicum subsp. altaicum, also known as the Altai flax or Altai meadow flax, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Linum, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum altaicum subsp. altaicum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Linum altaicum subsp. altaicum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
